reapack.name: Interactive-TC-Display
reapack.description: Concept by Mariow. Coding assistance by ChatGPT. Overview of the 'TimeCode' field depending on the context.
reapack.author: Mariow

reapack.name: TimeShift
reapack.description: Concept by Mariow. Coding assistance by ChatGPT. Precise Shifting of Items/Timeselection/CursPos.
reapack.author: Mariow

reapack.name: CreateTracksFromText
reapack.description: Concept by Mariow. Coding assistance by ChatGPT. Create Tracks from a formatted text.
reapack.author: Mariow

reapack.name: View-Item-Metadatas
reapack.description: Concept by Mariow. Coding assistance by ChatGPT. View item's metadatas.
reapack.author: Mariow
